options.content:
- **Developer Scorecard**: ranks contributors across GitHub (commits, PRs, code reviews) and Jira (issues resolved).
- Identity is resolved via DevLake's `user_accounts` mapping when available; falls back to tool display names.
- **Score formula**: Commits×1 + Lines/100×1 + PRs Merged×3 + PRs Reviewed×2 + Issues Resolved×2
- The bar chart shows each dimension normalized to 0-100 relative to the top contributor in that dimension.

targets.rawSql:
WITH commit_stats AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(u.name, c.author_name) AS developer,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.sha)            AS commits,
    SUM(c.additions + c.deletions)   AS lines_changed
  FROM commits c
  JOIN repo_commits rc ON rc.commit_sha = c.sha
  LEFT JOIN user_accounts ua ON ua.account_id = c.author_id
  LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = ua.user_id
  WHERE rc.repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND $__timeFilter(c.authored_date)
  GROUP BY 1
),
pr_stats AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(u.name, pr.author_name)                                      AS developer,
    COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id)                                                  AS prs_opened,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pr.status = 'MERGED' THEN pr.id END)         AS prs_merged
  FROM pull_requests pr
  LEFT JOIN user_accounts ua ON ua.account_id = pr.author_id
  LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = ua.user_id
  WHERE pr.base_repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND $__timeFilter(pr.created_date)
  GROUP BY 1
),
review_stats AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(u.name, prr.name)               AS developer,
    COUNT(DISTINCT prr.pull_request_id)       AS prs_reviewed
  FROM pull_request_reviewers prr
  JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = prr.pull_request_id
  LEFT JOIN user_accounts ua ON ua.account_id = prr.reviewer_id
  LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = ua.user_id
  WHERE pr.base_repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND $__timeFilter(pr.created_date)
  GROUP BY 1
),
issue_stats AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(u.name, i.assignee_name)                                   AS developer,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN i.status = 'DONE' THEN i.id END)           AS issues_done
  FROM issues i
  JOIN board_issues bi ON bi.issue_id = i.id
  LEFT JOIN user_accounts ua ON ua.account_id = i.assignee_id
  LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = ua.user_id
  WHERE bi.board_id IN (${board_id})
    AND $__timeFilter(i.resolution_date)
  GROUP BY 1
),
all_devs AS (
  SELECT developer FROM commit_stats  WHERE developer IS NOT NULL
  UNION
  SELECT developer FROM pr_stats      WHERE developer IS NOT NULL
  UNION
  SELECT developer FROM review_stats  WHERE developer IS NOT NULL
  UNION
  SELECT developer FROM issue_stats   WHERE developer IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  d.developer                              AS Developer,
  COALESCE(cs.commits, 0)                 AS Commits,
  COALESCE(cs.lines_changed, 0)           AS `Lines Changed`,
  COALESCE(ps.prs_merged, 0)             AS `PRs Merged`,
  COALESCE(rs.prs_reviewed, 0)           AS `PRs Reviewed`,
  COALESCE(iss.issues_done, 0)           AS `Issues Resolved`,
  COALESCE(cs.commits, 0)       * 1 +
    FLOOR(COALESCE(cs.lines_changed,  0) / 100) +
    COALESCE(ps.prs_merged,    0) * 3 +
    COALESCE(rs.prs_reviewed,  0) * 2 +
    COALESCE(iss.issues_done,  0) * 2     AS Score
FROM all_devs d
LEFT JOIN commit_stats  cs  ON cs.developer  = d.developer
LEFT JOIN pr_stats      ps  ON ps.developer  = d.developer
LEFT JOIN review_stats  rs  ON rs.developer  = d.developer
LEFT JOIN issue_stats   iss ON iss.developer = d.developer
ORDER BY Score DESC

panels.title: Developer Rankings [Activity in Selected Time Range]

targets.rawSql:
WITH commit_stats AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(u.name, c.author_name) AS developer,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.sha) AS commits, SUM(c.additions + c.deletions) AS lines_changed
  FROM commits c
  JOIN repo_commits rc ON rc.commit_sha = c.sha
  LEFT JOIN user_accounts ua ON ua.account_id = c.author_id
  LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = ua.user_id
  WHERE rc.repo_id IN (${repo_id}) AND $__timeFilter(c.authored_date)
  GROUP BY 1
),
pr_stats AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(u.name, pr.author_name) AS developer,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pr.status = 'MERGED' THEN pr.id END) AS prs_merged
  FROM pull_requests pr
  LEFT JOIN user_accounts ua ON ua.account_id = pr.author_id
  LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = ua.user_id
  WHERE pr.base_repo_id IN (${repo_id}) AND $__timeFilter(pr.created_date) GROUP BY 1
),
review_stats AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(u.name, prr.name) AS developer, COUNT(DISTINCT prr.pull_request_id) AS prs_reviewed
  FROM pull_request_reviewers prr
  JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = prr.pull_request_id
  LEFT JOIN user_accounts ua ON ua.account_id = prr.reviewer_id
  LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = ua.user_id
  WHERE pr.base_repo_id IN (${repo_id}) AND $__timeFilter(pr.created_date) GROUP BY 1
),
issue_stats AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(u.name, i.assignee_name) AS developer,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN i.status = 'DONE' THEN i.id END) AS issues_done
  FROM issues i JOIN board_issues bi ON bi.issue_id = i.id
  LEFT JOIN user_accounts ua ON ua.account_id = i.assignee_id
  LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = ua.user_id
  WHERE bi.board_id IN (${board_id}) AND $__timeFilter(i.resolution_date) GROUP BY 1
),
all_devs AS (
  SELECT developer FROM commit_stats WHERE developer IS NOT NULL
  UNION SELECT developer FROM pr_stats WHERE developer IS NOT NULL
  UNION SELECT developer FROM review_stats WHERE developer IS NOT NULL
  UNION SELECT developer FROM issue_stats WHERE developer IS NOT NULL
),
combined AS (
  SELECT d.developer,
    COALESCE(cs.commits, 0) AS commits,
    COALESCE(cs.lines_changed, 0) AS lines_changed,
    COALESCE(ps.prs_merged, 0) AS prs_merged,
    COALESCE(rs.prs_reviewed, 0) AS prs_reviewed,
    COALESCE(iss.issues_done, 0) AS issues_done
  FROM all_devs d
  LEFT JOIN commit_stats cs ON cs.developer = d.developer
  LEFT JOIN pr_stats ps ON ps.developer = d.developer
  LEFT JOIN review_stats rs ON rs.developer = d.developer
  LEFT JOIN issue_stats iss ON iss.developer = d.developer
),
maxvals AS (
  SELECT NULLIF(MAX(commits),0) mx_c, NULLIF(MAX(lines_changed),0) mx_l,
    NULLIF(MAX(prs_merged),0) mx_p, NULLIF(MAX(prs_reviewed),0) mx_r,
    NULLIF(MAX(issues_done),0) mx_i
  FROM combined
)
SELECT
  c.developer                                          AS Developer,
  ROUND(100 * c.commits          / m.mx_c)            AS `Commits`,
  ROUND(100 * c.lines_changed    / m.mx_l)            AS `Lines Changed`,
  ROUND(100 * c.prs_merged       / m.mx_p)            AS `PRs Merged`,
  ROUND(100 * c.prs_reviewed     / m.mx_r)            AS `PRs Reviewed`,
  ROUND(100 * c.issues_done      / m.mx_i)            AS `Issues Resolved`
FROM combined c, maxvals m
ORDER BY (COALESCE(c.commits/m.mx_c,0)+COALESCE(c.lines_changed/m.mx_l,0)+COALESCE(c.prs_merged/m.mx_p,0)+COALESCE(c.prs_reviewed/m.mx_r,0)+COALESCE(c.issues_done/m.mx_i,0)) DESC

panels.title: Relative Contribution per Dimension [Activity in Selected Time Range]

list.definition: SELECT project_name FROM user_project_mapping WHERE user_login = '${__user.login}'
list.label: Project
list.name: project
list.query: SELECT project_name FROM user_project_mapping WHERE user_login = '${__user.login}'

list.definition: SELECT concat(r.name, '--', r.id) as text FROM repos r JOIN project_mapping pm ON pm.row_id = r.id AND pm.table = 'repos' WHERE r.id LIKE 'github%' AND pm.project_name IN (${project})
list.label: GitHub Repo
list.name: repo_id
list.query: SELECT concat(r.name, '--', r.id) as text FROM repos r JOIN project_mapping pm ON pm.row_id = r.id AND pm.table = 'repos' WHERE r.id LIKE 'github%' AND pm.project_name IN (${project})

list.definition: SELECT concat(b.name, '--', b.id) FROM boards b JOIN project_mapping pm ON pm.row_id = b.id AND pm.table = 'boards' WHERE b.id LIKE 'jira%' AND pm.project_name IN (${project})
list.label: Jira Board
list.name: board_id
list.query: SELECT concat(b.name, '--', b.id) FROM boards b JOIN project_mapping pm ON pm.row_id = b.id AND pm.table = 'boards' WHERE b.id LIKE 'jira%' AND pm.project_name IN (${project})
